rules.Adjusted Tactics: During Deployment, after you have seen the Army Roster your opponent is bringing, this model may swap its current weapon(s) for legal weapon options equal to or less than the current point costs. For example, a Tactical Marine may swap its Plasma Gun for a Flamer because it costs less points.
rules.Bolter Discipline: This model always counts as being in half range when firing Rapid Fire weapons that have Bolter as long as it did not Move or does not count as Moving during your Movement Phase.
rules.Know No Fear: This unit automatically passes Pinning Tests, Rally Tests, and Fear Tests. They still will fall back if they lose Combat Resolution.
rules.Tactical Squads: Each unit with this rule may declare they are forming their own units during your Command Phase. They may split up as low as two models per unit. Units must be placed within Unit Coherency during Deployment. They may instead merge back into bigger units but may not exceed maximum unit size or merge with units other than their own unit name. If they do so, all suffered Wounds stack onto the most wounded models in the form of Mortal Wounds. If there are more to stack then remaining Wounds on a model, nominate another model to suffer these remaining Mortal Wounds. Independent Characters can never pass on Wounds or take on Wounds for a unit in this fashion.
rules.Transhuman Physiology: This model has a 5+ Feel No Pain.

rules.name: Well Disciplined
rules.description: models may reroll 1s To Hit. Auras that allow reroll 1s To Hit allow all failed To Hit rolls of 1 or 2 to be rerolled instead.

rules.name: Justified
rules.description: All models in your army gain Ld+1.

rules.name: Righteous Zeal
rules.description: All models in your army may reroll 1s To Wound in Melee on the phase they successfully Charged.

rules.name: Black Rage
rules.description: If a unit ever fails its Ld test, they suffer WS+1, BS+1 (One worse) and gain A+1 for the remainder of the game. Units suffering from the Black Rage must declare Charges if within Range, and cannot fire weapons or Advance if it would make declaring a Charge within range illegal. If a Charge cannot be declared, the unit must move towards the closest enemy unit and Advance if it still cannot Charge or Shoot them.

rules.name: Quicksilver Blood
rules.description: All models in your army gain I+1.

rules.name: Unnatural Speed
rules.description: All models in your army gain Counterattack.

rules.name: Relic Seekers
rules.description: Any Objective Marker that scores Victory Points for the enemy while your army has a scoreable unit within 3” awards you .5 Victory Points as well.

rules.name: Unknown Origins
rules.description: All models in your army suffer Ld-1.

rules.name: Hold the Line
rules.description: All models in your army may reroll failed Sv rolls of 1.

rules.name: Unwavering
rules.description: All models in your army may reroll failed Ld Tests.

rules.name: Foreboding Knowledge
rules.description: All Characters and Independent Characters suffer Ld-1.

rules.name: Watchers
rules.description: Any Character or Independent Character may take a Watcher Token. Any unit the Independent Character is in (or themselves) may reroll any one die per Phase.

rules.name: Extreme Trials
rules.description: You may treat Scouts, Bladeguard Veterans, Company Veterans, Sternguard Veterans, and Vanguard Veterans as Troop Slots.

rules.name: Long Suffering
rules.description: All models in your army gain Ld+1.

rules.name: Monster Hunters
rules.description: All models in your army gain +1 To Wound Monstrous Infantry, Monsters, or Titanic Monsters in Melee.

rules.name: Trophy Hunters
rules.description: No models in your army may claim Objective Markers. Emperor’s Spears:

rules.name: Savages
rules.description: All models in this army have Furious Charge.

rules.name: Aggressive Tactics
rules.description: All models in this army add +2” to Charges.

rules.name: Extensive Rituals
rules.description: This army will always lose Initiative Rolls for who decides Attacking and Defending Players.

rules.name: Spiritual Resolve
rules.description: All units in this army may Deny the Witch at Psychic Master Level 1, or +1 If they already have Psychic Mastery.

rules.name: Rip and Tear
rules.description: All Melee attacks made by your army are considered Rending. Rending weapons trigger on a 4+ instead of 5+ If a 4+ would still be successful.

rules.name: Eager Warmongers
rules.description: All units in your army may reroll failed Charges.

rules.name: Imperial Fist Bolter Drill
rules.description: All models are always considered as sitting still for purposes of Bolter Discipline.

rules.name: Shore up the Defenses
rules.description: Buildings Embarked by Imperial Fist units gain T+1 while they are inside.

rules.name: Deadly Efficiency
rules.description: You may treat Devastator Squads and Dreadnoughts (no variants or specialized versions) as Troop Slots or their respective Slots.

rules.name: Heavy Fire Doctrines
rules.description: All models Snapshot on a 5+ with Heavy weapons, including Overwatch, instead of the usual 6+.

rules.name: Protect Civilians
rules.description: You army may only score VP based on Objectives requiring Objective Markers to be held.

rules.name: Protect What is Already Possessed
rules.description: Gain +1 VP per completed Objective for Objectives 11-36 once per Turn.

rules.name: The Martial Bond
rules.description: All Ranged and Melee Attacks from this army have the Gauss Rule.

rules.name: Ultima Founding
rules.description: This army may only include models with the Stubborn rule.

rules.name: Strike from the Shadows
rules.description: All models in your army gain Stealth. If they already had Stealth, they swap Stealth for Shroud instead.

rules.name: Aggressive Nature
rules.description: All models in your army gain Furious Charge.

rules.name: Wolfen Fury
rules.description: All models in your army gain A+1 on the turn they Charge.

rules.name: The Pursuit of Knowledge
rules.description: All models in your army gain Ld+4 when within 3” of an Objective.

rules.name: Knowledge Absolute
rules.description: Gain 2 VP for Kingslayer instead of D3.

rules.name: Guardians of the Cadian Gate
rules.description: All infantry models in your army gain Objective Secured and Stubborn when within 3” of an Objective Marker.

rules.name: Speed Tactics
rules.description: All models in your army gain Hit and Run.

rules.name: Rapid Deployment
rules.description: All models in your army gain Scout.

rules.name: Bleeding the Prey
rules.description: If the target of Charge is at half or less of the combined unit’s total Wounds from Deployment, the Charge automatically succeeds if it is within 12”.

rules.name: Ultima Founding
rules.description: This army may only include models with the Stubborn rule.
